name: Rising Sun Slash
name_jp: ホープ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スラッシュ
desc: Equip only to a "Utopia" monster. It cannot be destroyed by card effects. Each time an attack is negated, place 1 Rising Sun Counter on this card. The equipped monster gains 500 ATK for each Rising Sun Counter on this card. If the equipped monster you control would detach its material to activate its effect, you can treat this card as 1 of the materials.
eff: Equip only to a "Utopia" monster. It cannot be destroyed by card effects. Each time an attack is negated, place 1 Rising Sun Counter on this card. The equipped monster gains 500 ATK for each Rising Sun Counter on this card. If the equipped monster you control would detach its material to activate its effect, you can treat this card as 1 of the materials.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Replaces detaching own Xyz Materials for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Equipped cannot be destroyed by card effects
misc: Equips only to a specific target
